---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability for Axiom
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem / Workflow Gap

What investigation workflow problem does this solve?  
What are you currently unable to do, or what takes too many steps?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature in detail. Include:
- Where it would appear in the UI
- How an analyst would interact with it
- What data it would read from or write to

## Alternatives Considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could solve this?

## Ethical / Security Considerations

Does this feature have any privacy, legal, or security implications?  
How should it be scoped to remain within lawful, authorized-use boundaries?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
